author: Jason Heddings
description: Render ChordPro format code blocks in Obsidian. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
name: ChordPro Viewer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Maintenance
- **(lint)** adopt eslint-plugin-obsidianmd and fix violations
- **(manifest)** drop redundant "Obsidian" and remove invalid css field
- migrate test runner from jest to vitest
- clear remaining plugin dashboard validator findings

## Dependencies
- @types/node → ^24.12.4
- builtin-modules → v5.2.0
- jest → ^30.4.2
- lint-staged → ^17.0.4
- obskit → v2
- typescript-eslint → ^8.59.3
- vitest → ^4.1.6
- yaml → ^2.9.0
releases.name: obsidian-chopro-0.9.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Maintenance
- **(ci)** drop Node 18, add Node 24 to test matrix
- **(deps)** update actions/setup-node action to v6.4.0
- add commit and branch naming conventions to CLAUDE.md
- add git-cliff for structured release notes
- replace explicit any with unknown and concrete types

## Dependencies
- @types/node → ^24.12.3
- builtin-modules → v5.1.0
- esbuild → v0.28.0
- eslint → ^10.3.0
- jest → ^30.4.1
- lint-staged → v17
- node → v24.15.0
- prettier → ^3.8.3
- ts-jest → ^29.4.9
- typescript → v6
- typescript-eslint → ^8.59.2
- yaml → ^2.8.4
releases.name: obsidian-chopro-0.9.3

releases.author: jheddings
releases.description:
First working version of the plugin.

Supported features:

- Inline chord placement
- Nashville numbers
- Basic song metadata
- Custom styling for chords
releases.name: obsidian-chopro-0.1.0
